titleEn: Genetics to take centre stage at SIAVS 2026 in São Paulo
titleZh: 遗传学将成为2026年圣保罗SIAVS展会焦点
summaryZh: 2026年8月4日至6日，巴西国际动物蛋白展（SIAVS）将在圣保罗Anhembi区举行，遗传学将成为核心议题。家禽和猪育种公司将展示在体重增长、饲料转化率、批次均匀性和工业出肉率等方面的最新遗传进展。ABPA主席强调遗传学是生产效率的起点，展会还将涵盖营养、健康和管理等整合技术，预计展出面积达4.5万平方米，吸引60多个国家的参展商和观众。
featuredReason: 该新闻揭示了遗传学在畜牧生产效率中的基础性作用，与智慧畜牧中数据驱动选育、精准管理理念高度契合，为行业人士提供了从源头提升竞争力的战略视角。
contentFull: Industry and legislation Conferences & Events Genetics to take centre stage at SIAVS 2026 in São Paulo Poultry, swine breeders to showcase advances in productivity 4 May 2026 1 minute read By: Global Ag Media South America The genetic basis of animal protein production will be highlighted at the International Animal Protein Show (SIAVS 2026), which will be held from August 4 to 6 at the Anhembi District in São Paulo. With the presence of companies specialising in poultry and swine genetics, the event will present solutions that support productivity and quality gains throughout the chain, according to a recent press release from the Brazilian Association for Animal Protein (ABPA).Companies in this sector work on developing breeding lines and supplying high-performance genetic material, focusing on characteristics such as weight gain, feed conversion, batch uniformity, and industrial yield. These advancements have a direct impact on the efficiency of production systems and the competitiveness of agribusinesses.At SIAVS, the topic will be addressed in an applied manner, connected to other areas of the supply chain. Genetics integrates with nutrition, health, and management strategies, forming the technical basis that supports productive performance and the standardization required by the markets.Key highlights include continuous improvement programs, data-driven selection, and technologies focused on consistent results at scale. Genetic advancements have enabled more efficient production cycles and greater predictability in operations.The presence of these companies reinforces the technical nature of the event and expands opportunities for interaction between genetics suppliers, producers, and agribusinesses, focusing on practical application and decision-making."Genetics is the starting point for productive efficiency," said Ricardo Santin, president of ABPA. "It is from genetics that consistent gains in performance and quality are structured throughout the entire chain."In addition to the trade fair, the event will feature a technical program that will include topics related to production efficiency, innovation, and trends in animal production.SIAVS 2026 will occupy 45,000 square meters, a 65% increase compared to the previous edition, and is expected to bring together hundreds of exhibiting companies and visitors from more than 60 countries. translationZh:
动物蛋白生产的遗传学基础将在国际动物蛋白展（SIAVS 2026）上得到重点展示，该展会将于8月4日至6日在圣保罗Anhembi区举行。据巴西动物蛋白协会（ABPA）最新新闻稿称，随着家禽和猪遗传学专业公司的参与，该展会将呈现支持整个产业链生产力和质量提升的解决方案。

该领域的公司致力于开发育种品系并提供高性能遗传材料，重点关注体重增长、饲料转化率、批次均匀性和工业出肉率等特性。这些进步直接影响生产系统的效率和农业企业的竞争力。

在SIAVS展会上，该主题将以应用性方式呈现，并与供应链的其他领域相连接。遗传学与营养、健康和管理策略相结合，构成支撑生产性能和市场所需标准化的技术基础。

关键亮点包括持续改良计划、数据驱动的选育以及专注于规模化稳定结果的技术。遗传学进步已实现更高效的生产周期和更高的运营可预测性。

这些公司的参与强化了展会的技术属性，并扩大了遗传学供应商、生产者和农业企业之间的互动机会，聚焦于实际应用和决策制定。

**“遗传学是生产效率的起点，”** ABPA主席Ricardo Santin表示。**“正是从遗传学出发，整个产业链才能构建起性能和质量的持续提升。”**

除贸易展览外，展会还将设置技术议程，涵盖与生产效率、创新和动物生产趋势相关的主题。

SIAVS 2026将占据4.5万平方米的展区，比上一届增加65%，预计将汇聚数百家参展公司和来自60多个国家的参观者。
contentHtml:
Genetics to take centre stage at SIAVS 2026 in São Paulo 
Poultry, swine breeders to showcase advances in productivity
